message:
chore(deps): Update Go module dependencies to latest stable versions

Updates go.mod and go.sum with latest compatible dependency versions.
This is a routine maintenance update performed via the library-updater workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
